query:
-- Insert test vendor documents
INSERT INTO documents (
  id, organizationId, operatingUnitId, fileName, fileUrl, fileSize, mimeType,
  documentStage, relatedEntityType, relatedEntityId, storageProvider,
  description, uploadedBy, createdAt, updatedAt, updatedBy, isDeleted,
  workspace, isFolder
) VALUES
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Vendor_Registration_ABC.pdf', 's3://bucket/vendor-reg-abc.pdf', 102400, 'application/pdf',
   '01_Vendor_Registration', 'vendor', '1', 's3', 'Vendor registration document for ABC Supplies', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'donor_crm', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Compliance_Certificate_ABC.pdf', 's3://bucket/compliance-abc.pdf', 51200, 'application/pdf',
   '02_Compliance_Documents', 'vendor', '1', 's3', 'ISO 9001 compliance certificate', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'donor_crm', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Performance_Report_Q1_ABC.pdf', 's3://bucket/perf-q1-abc.pdf', 204800, 'application/pdf',
   '03_Performance_Reports', 'vendor', '1', 's3', 'Q1 2026 performance report', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'donor_crm', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Contract_ABC_2026.pdf', 's3://bucket/contract-abc-2026.pdf', 307200, 'application/pdf',
   '04_Contracts', 'vendor', '1', 's3', 'Annual supply contract 2026', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'donor_crm', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Payment_Invoice_ABC_Mar2026.pdf', 's3://bucket/invoice-abc-mar2026.pdf', 76800, 'application/pdf',
   '05_Payment_Records', 'vendor', '1', 's3', 'March 2026 invoice and payment record', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'donor_crm', 0),

-- Insert test stock documents
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Stock_Receipt_STK001.xlsx', 's3://bucket/receipt-stk001.xlsx', 153600, 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
   '01_Stock_Receipts', 'stock_movement', '60002', 's3', 'Stock receipt for printer HP', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'risk_compliance', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Stock_Transfer_STK001_to_WH2.xlsx', 's3://bucket/transfer-stk001.xlsx', 102400, 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
   '02_Stock_Transfers', 'stock_movement', '60002', 's3', 'Transfer from main warehouse to branch', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'risk_compliance', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Inventory_Report_Mar2026.xlsx', 's3://bucket/inventory-mar2026.xlsx', 204800, 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
   '03_Inventory_Reports', 'stock_movement', '60002', 's3', 'March 2026 inventory count report', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'risk_compliance', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Stock_Adjustment_Damaged.xlsx', 's3://bucket/adjustment-damaged.xlsx', 76800, 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
   '04_Adjustments', 'stock_movement', '60002', 's3', 'Adjustment for damaged items', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'risk_compliance', 0),
  (UUID(), 30002, 30002, 'Stock_Audit_Report_Mar2026.pdf', 's3://bucket/audit-mar2026.pdf', 256000, 'application/pdf',
   '05_Audits', 'stock_movement', '60002', 's3', 'Internal audit report for stock verification', 1264648, NOW(), NOW(), 1264648, 0, 'risk_compliance', 0);
